afterSnapshot.name: computeLegRiskScore
afterSnapshot.purpose: Roll wind, visibility, pressure trend, sunset/darkness, and ETA uncertainty into a single explainable 0–100 per-leg risk score with a 4-tier level and per-factor contributions.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The feature needs a single explainable risk number per leg; a pure function (like computeLegWarnings) keeps it unit-testable and config-driven.
implementation: Five capped factors (30/20/20/15/15 = 100) summed from integer-rounded points so the meter segments add up to the score exactly; mirrors the existing computeLegWarnings signature/threshold style and adds the ETA-uncertainty factor driven by cumulative travel time + wind reliability.
